panels.title: Map the journey, not just the screens
panels.description: Design a narrative route that follows user intent across awareness, trust and action.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 20%, rgba(42, 232, 255, 0.45) 0%, rgba(42, 232, 255, 0.1) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 18%, rgba(170, 89, 255, 0.45) 0%, rgba(170, 89, 255, 0.1) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(140deg, #040813 0%, #0f2550 48%, #201050 100%)

panels.title: Hook with a bold first moment
panels.description: Your opening scene should instantly frame value and curiosity.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 84% 22%, rgba(255, 101, 189, 0.4) 0%, rgba(255, 101, 189, 0.09) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 16% 78%, rgba(79, 128, 255, 0.42) 0%, rgba(79, 128, 255, 0.1) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(148deg, #090816 0%, #2b1250 52%, #152a50 100%)

panels.title: Guide attention with directional rhythm
panels.description: Alternate vertical and horizontal transitions to keep energy high.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 24% 80%, rgba(48, 255, 224, 0.35) 0%, rgba(48, 255, 224, 0.08) 36%, transparent 64%), radial-gradient(circle at 76% 20%, rgba(124, 97, 255, 0.45) 0%, rgba(124, 97, 255, 0.1) 34%, transparent 62%), linear-gradient(128deg, #050a10 0%, #12303f 48%, #1f1d58 100%)

panels.title: Drop social proof at the turn
panels.description: Use the directional shift to reveal testimonials or measurable outcomes.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 16%, rgba(255, 178, 74, 0.4) 0%, rgba(255, 178, 74, 0.1) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 82%, rgba(212, 78, 255, 0.38) 0%, rgba(212, 78, 255, 0.08) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(152deg, #0a0914 0%, #1e2a5b 50%, #3d1457 100%)

panels.title: Create a final ascent
panels.description: Bring users upward into a decisive, low-friction call to action.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 72% 18%, rgba(80, 223, 255, 0.42) 0%, rgba(80, 223, 255, 0.1) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 26% 78%, rgba(175, 99, 255, 0.4) 0%, rgba(175, 99, 255, 0.1) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(136deg, #060914 0%, #162d54 48%, #25124f 100%)

panels.title: Publish and embed everywhere
panels.description: Go live in minutes with a story that keeps its structure across every channel.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 52% 14%, rgba(115, 148, 255, 0.45) 0%, rgba(115, 148, 255, 0.1) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 84%, rgba(209, 74, 255, 0.42) 0%, rgba(209, 74, 255, 0.09) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(180deg, #050914 0%, #13254b 46%, #2d1453 100%)
